title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements that make OpsPal more reliable for your daily workflows. We fixed several issues that were preventing Salesforce and HubSpot automations from running properly, and improved how the system handles complex deployment processes. These behind-the-scenes fixes ensure your revenue operations run smoothly without interruption.

entries.headline: Restored missing historical data from weeks 12 and 13
Improved Salesforce field validation and deployment reliability
details: Better detection of State/Country picklist configurations that can cause workflow errors
Enhanced permission checking during Salesforce deployments
More reliable handling of complex deployment processes
